question: Which colored area has the largest share of the population in the most recent year shown?

options.A: Cannot determine which color has the largest share without a legend to explain what each color represents.
options.B: The purple area shows the largest share in the most recent year.
options.C: The brown area shows the largest share in the most recent year.
options.D: The red area indicates the largest share in the most recent year.

explanation: The chart shows different colored areas but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category holds the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
